scripts.build: pnpm run db:generate && pnpm --recursive run build
scripts.minio:up: docker start minio >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker run -d --name minio -p 9000:9000 -p 9001:9001 -e MINIO_ROOT_USER=${MINIO_ROOT_USER:-minioadmin} -e MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-minioadmin123} -v minio-data:/data minio/minio server /data --console-address ":9001"
scripts.minio:bucket: docker run --rm --entrypoint /bin/sh minio/mc -c 'mc alias set local http://host.docker.internal:9000 ${MINIO_ROOT_USER:-minioadmin} ${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-minioadmin123} && mc mb --ignore-existing local/${MINIO_BUCKET:-tiktok-assets} && mc anonymous set download local/${MINIO_BUCKET:-tiktok-assets}'
scripts.minio:ls: docker run --rm --entrypoint /bin/sh minio/mc -c 'mc alias set local http://host.docker.internal:9000 ${MINIO_ROOT_USER:-minioadmin} ${MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD:-minioadmin123} && mc ls local/${MINIO_BUCKET:-tiktok-assets}'
